genuine_T3_T5_judgment_edges.note: Single-founder, dentist-owned, multi-location groups operating under ONE brand with a public locator but NO external MSO/management-company and NOT flagged corporate by the legacy classifier: Dental Town (Dr. Razzak, 12 loc, 'VP of Operations' AO), MetroSmiles (Dr. Tsaliagos, 7 loc), Shining Smiles (Dr. Nourahmadi, 5 loc), plain Sonrisa Family Dental (Dr. Korkus), plain Precision (Dr. Chang), PALELLA, KHURANA. Per the LOCKED model these sit exactly on the T3/T5 line: T3 = dentist-owned multi, NO platform; T5 = established DSO brand OR platform/management structure, brand IS the NPPES name. reach5 reads them as T3; my addendum read the brand+locator as T5. BOTH are defensible. This is a POLICY call, not a data error.

PART_3_implication_for_my_own_addendum: Honest self-correction flag: my DSO-structure addendum used a blanket 'documentary locator to an established multi-location brand -> restore DSO-tier'. That is correct for true MSO/platform brands (Dental Dreams/KOS, United Dental Partners, Webster Management, Imagen, 1st Family, Sonrisa-capitation/CDCA) but may OVER-restore the single-founder owned-multi groups above (Dental Town, plain Precision, plain Sonrisa, and by extension MetroSmiles/Shining Smiles were not in my set). If the Gate Owner's T3/T5 policy is 'single-founder owned-multi with no external MSO = dentist_multi', my addendum needs a v2 demoting those specific rows back to dentist_multi. I will write that addendum v2 on request — I am NOT doing it unilaterally because (a) it is a policy call the Gate Owner owns, and (b) the user explicitly listed 'Dental Town / Dental 360 / Sonrisa / Precision' among brands to RESTORE, which points the other way. The conflict must be resolved by ONE policy, then applied consistently to BOTH files.
recommendation_to_gate_owner: 1. ACCEPT the reach5 mechanics: corrected regate is sound; the 10 Dental Dreams/KOS restorations and the clean contradiction battery are confirmed.

2. RESTORE the 4 objective-miss rows (Sonrisa Capitation Esperanza, 1st Family 'Dental Profile 2', Precision Dental Care LLC x2) from dentist_multi -> stealth_dso before manifest; they are already dso_regional+affiliated_dso in the DB.

3. SET ONE explicit T3/T5 decision test for single-founder branded multi-location groups (decisive question: is there a separate management-company/MSO/centralized-operations layer, or numbered-LLC/friendly-PC/capitation structure -> T5; pure single-owner with no such layer -> T3). Note Dental Town has a centralized 'VP of Operations' signing all NPIs, which leans T5.
4. APPLY that policy CONSISTENTLY to BOTH reach5 and my addendum, then build the canonical manifest. Tell me the policy and I will reconcile my addendum via an addendum v2 (no silent rewrite).
5. Headline impact: every conflict row is already Consolidated either way, so the Consolidated headline (T2+T3+T4+T5) is unaffected; only the DSO/PE-only headline (T4+T5) moves with this decision.
